options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: end_goal
options.description:
The end goal required to beat the game.

Crow's Nest: Defeat Razorbeard in the Crow's Nest.
Treasure%: Take Jano's offer in the Cave of Bad Dreams.
100%: Requires collecting all 1000 lums, 80 cages, and 4 masks, then defeating Razorbeard.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: room_randomisation
options.description: Whether to enable room randomization which will randomize the order of all levels.

options.name: lumsanity
options.description: Whether all individual yellow lums should be their own checks instead of only super lums. This will add 710 extra progression checks!

options.name: instant_portal_access
options.description: Whether all portals should be accessible as soon as you obtain enough lums. Will speed up the game considerably.

options.name: fixed_level_lengths
options.description: Whether to use fixed level lengths with room randomisation, which ensures every level has as many rooms as it does in the base game.

options.name: first_gate_required
options.description: The amount of lums required to enter the Sanctuary of Water and Ice.

options.name: second_gate_required
options.description: The amount of lums required to enter the Sanctuary of Stone & Fire.

options.name: third_gate_required
options.description: The amount of lums required to enter Beneath the Sanctuary of Rock & Lava.

options.name: fourth_gate_required
options.description: The amount of lums required to enter the Iron Mountains.

options.name: walk_of_life_required
options.description: The amount of lums required to enter the Walk of Life.

options.name: walk_of_power_required
options.description: The amount of lums required to enter the Walk of Power.
